title: PD-Insighter Paper Accepted to SIGCHI 2024
summary: Our paper on PD-Insighter, a visual analytics system for monitoring Parkinson's Disease treatment, has been accepted to CHI 2024.

title: Ashley Neall – Best Use of Looking Glass at MIT Reality Hack 2024
summary: Ashley Neall won Best Use of Looking Glass at MIT Reality Hack 2024.

title: Pranav Wagh – Best Healthcare Hack at HackPrinceton 2024
summary: Pranav Wagh won Best Healthcare Hack at HackPrinceton 2024.

title: Praneeth Chakravarthula Rejoins UNC as Tenure-Track Assistant Professor
summary: Praneeth Chakravarthula returns to UNC as a tenure-track Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science.
